plugin_description: This QField plugin will make you map the moon!
repository_url_base: https://{{ cookiecutter.ci_platform | lower }}.com/{{ cookiecutter.plugin_author | slugify }}/{{ cookiecutter.plugin_name_slug }}

__prompts__.plugin_name: Plugin name, used to populate the `metadata.txt` file essentially.
__prompts__.plugin_name_slug: Slugified name, will be used to create the directory for the source code. Default value deduced from the plugin name.
__prompts__.plugin_locales: Comma-separated list of locales to support translations for the plugin. Can also be configured later.
__prompts__.ci_platform: CI platform to configure for this plugin.
__prompts__.repository_url_base: Base URL of the repository for this plugin.
__prompts__.open_source_license: License to use for the plugin.
